title: PENDLETON ANIMAL WELFARE SHELTER - 211info
text: PIONEER HUMANE SOCIETY PENDLETON ANIMAL WELFARE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter with opportunities to adopt dogs and cats, all of which have been spayed or neutered. Also provides an animal shelter, and a low-cost spay and neutering clinic. This is a no-kill shelter. 517 SE 3rd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Adoption and Shelter: Unrestricted Neuter/Spay Services: Low-income households Hours: Tuesday-Saturday noon-4pm Email (541) 276-0181 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-0181 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Photos and information of adoptable dogs and cats as well as adoption applications available on website. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of SE 3rd Street and Goodwin Avenue Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters Neuter/Spay Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PIONEER HUMANE SOCIETY
